title: Independent Inquiry into Grooming Gangs: letters
body: "The appointment of the Chair and panellists of the Independent Inquiry into Grooming Gangs was announced on 9 December, alongside the publication of the draft terms of reference.  The correspondence published here for transparency covers:   Baroness Casey’s recommendation to the Prime Minister and Home Secretary an exchange of letters between the Home Secretary and the inquiry panel an exchange of letters between the Home Secretary and the leader of Oldham Council an exchange of letters between the inquiry Chair and Baroness Casey  "
